requirement_topic.en: Regulatory Baseline — RETIE, RETILAP, RETIQ and ONAC Certification
requirement_topic.zh: 合规基础——RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ 与 ONAC 认证
requirement_topic.zht: 合規基礎——RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ 與 ONAC 認證

summary.en: Lithium battery and power bank models must follow Chile-to-market Colombian electrical and installation requirements via the RETIE framework, and where lighting-related functions are present, RETILAP applies. Products where RETIQ labeling applies must also satisfy energy-labelling expectations. Both pathways are implemented through ONAC-accredited conformity bodies and certificate workflows in the target market.
summary.zh: 向哥伦比亚出口的锂电池及移动电源，需依据 RETIE 体系走对应的技术法规路线；涉及照明功能的型号还需按 RETILAP 审核。若适用于 RETIQ 标识，需按该框架满足能效标签要求。上述路径均通过哥伦比亚 ONAC 承认的认证机构并结合市场准入证明流程执行。
summary.zht: 向哥倫比亞出口的鋰電池及行動電源，需依據 RETIE 體系走對應之技術法規路徑；涉及照明功能之型號亦需按 RETILAP 審核。若適用 RETIQ 標示，需遵循該框架滿足能效標籤要求。上述路徑均透過哥倫比亞 ONAC 承認之認證機構並結合市場准入證明流程執行。

standards_or_laws: Ministerio de Minas y Energía RETIE framework (electrical safety and installation conformity context)
RETILAP technical requirements for products in the affected lighting scope
RETIQ labeling framework for electricity-related energy labeling where applicable
ONAC accreditation and conformity pathways for import-facing evaluation

summary.en: China uses GB / GB T safety and performance routes and CCC where applicable for domestic-market and export documentation, but those schemes are a different legal structure and not a direct Colombia market-clearance substitute for RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ pathways.
summary.zh: 中国以 GB/GBT 安全与性能体系为主，并在适用范围内执行 CCC，其体系结构与哥伦比亚不同，不能直接替代 RETIE、RETILAP 或 RETIQ 的市场准入路径。
summary.zht: 中國以 GB/GBT 安全與性能體系為主，並在適用範圍內執行 CCC，其體系結構與哥倫比亞不同，不能直接替代 RETIE、RETILAP 或 RETIQ 的市場准入路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB / GB T safety standards used for lithium battery documentation

gap.en: The main exporter gap is structural: Colombia requires destination-country certification logic and ONAC-facing dossiers, while Chinese compliance packets are usually prepared around domestic import-export logic and are not complete without ONAC, RETIE/RETILAP, and RETIQ mapping.
gap.zh: 出口商的主要差距是结构性差异：哥伦比亚要求按目的地规则建立 ONAC 认证及技术文件体系，而中国文件通常按国内合规逻辑形成，在未完成 RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ 映射前不足以完成市场准入。
gap.zht: 出口商之主要差距為結構性差異：哥倫比亞要求按目的地規則建立 ONAC 認證及技術文件體系，而中國文件通常按國內合規邏輯形成，在未完成 RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ 映射前不足以完成市場准入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope import models before commercialization in Colombia; ONAC-recognized compliance paths are required where RETIE or RETILAP is applicable.
mandatory_status.cn: GB / GB T and CCC are mandatory in China contexts where they apply, but are not equivalent replacements for Colombia destination regulatory routes.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Colombian certification as a target-country process; do not use China GB/T or CCC evidence as a shortcut to RETIE/RETILAP or RETIQ compliance in the Chile destination chain.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将哥伦比亚认证视为目的地合规流程；不能将中国 GB/T 或 CCC 证据当作哥伦比亚 RETIE/RETILAP 或 RETIQ 合规的捷径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將哥倫比亞認證視為目標市場合規流程；不能將中國 GB/T 或 CCC 證據當作哥倫比亞 RETIE/RETILAP 或 RETIQ 合規的捷徑。
